meta.title: Tzevet Hatzolah
meta.description: Tzevet Hatzolah — volunteer emergency rescue organization active 24/7 across Israel.

hero.title:
We are here every moment —
Saving lives every day
hero.subtitle: Tzevet Hatzolah operates around the clock with hundreds of certified volunteers across the country.

mission.title: Who We Are
mission.text: Tzevet Hatzolah is dedicated to saving lives and providing first-response medical assistance in real time, with dedication and professionalism.

donate_block.subtitle: Join thousands of donors who support us every month
